name: norxs-tsn-zonal-backbone-1.1.0
comment: Software Bill of Materials for the norxs Deterministic TSN Zonal Backbone reference implementation. The production library has ZERO third-party runtime dependencies by design (AUTOSAR C++14: no dynamic allocation, freestanding-style use of <cstdint>/<cstddef>/<array>/<limits> only). GoogleTest is a test-time-only dependency and is never linked into the deliverable static library. This SBOM is regenerated and reviewed at every tagged release per the norxs Open Source Policy (docs/compliance/openchain-iso5230.md).

packages.name: norxs-tsn-zonal-backbone
packages.copyrightText: (c) 2026 norxs Technology LLC. All rights reserved.
packages.description: AUTOSAR C++14 IEEE 802.1Qbv/CB/Qci/AE TSN stack with Network Calculus latency verification for NXP i.MX8X. Static library, no third-party runtime dependencies.

packages.name: googletest
packages.description: Unit test framework. TEST-SCOPE ONLY: linked exclusively into the norxs-tsn-tests host binary when -DNORXS_BUILD_TESTS=ON; never distributed with, or linked into, the production library.

hasExtractedLicensingInfos.name: norxs Reference Implementation License v1.0
hasExtractedLicensingInfos.extractedText: See LICENSES/LicenseRef-norxs-RI-1.0.txt in this repository for the complete license text. Evaluation, study, and academic use permitted; commercial use requires a separate license agreement with norxs Technology LLC.

relationships.comment: googletest is a build-time, test-only dependency of norxs-tsn-zonal-backbone; it is never part of the distributed artifact.
